data.title: Exodus Movement Appoints Receiver in United Kingdom to Take Control of Monavate and Baanx
data.description: Omaha, Nebraska - On April 28, 2026, Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD), a prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency platform, declared the activation of its contractual authority to designate Receivers in the United Kingdom to manage Monavate Holdings Limited, Monavate Ltd, and Baanx.com Ltd. These entities are subsidiaries of W3C Corp, and their shares were pledged as collateral for a secured loan. W3C defaulted on the loan, prompting Exodus to take control of these three companies through the appointed Receivers.

data.title: Convr® Strengthens Customer Experience Team with New Vice President Hire
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Chicago, Convr®, a prominent AI company catering to commercial insurance firms through its customizable underwriting workbench, revealed the appointment of Jason Allen as the new Vice President of Customer Experience. Allen will spearhead initiatives in this position.

data.title: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. Has Filed Its Annual Report for the Fiscal Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. and subsidiaries (NYSE: CPAC; BVL: CPACASC1), a prominent cement company in Peru, has submitted its annual report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The 2025 Annual Report, along with the audited financial statements, are now available for viewing on either the SEC website at www.sec.gov or the company’s official website.

data.title: Pit Boss and Academy Sports + Outdoors Partner for NASCAR Experience at Texas Motor Speedway
data.description: A collaboration between Pit Boss® and Academy Sports + Outdoors will showcase co-branded NASCAR activities during Texas Independence Weekend in Columbus, Ga., starting on April 28, 2026. The event will feature a race car with both brands, driver appearances, and a fan event in-store. This initiative is set to reach a significant audience, including NASCAR enthusiasts, with a wide range of promotions and activities planned.

data.title: S&P Global Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: On April 28, 2026, S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) shared its first quarter financial results. To access the Company's earnings release and additional materials, visit http://investor.spglobal.com/Quarterly-Earnings. For more information regarding the Supplemental Information, Conference Call, and Webcast Details, refer to the provided link.

data.title: GitHub Copilot Dev Days Comes to Florida - One Event, One City, One Chance
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on April 28, 2026, NLP Logix announced their sponsorship of the sole GitHub Copilot Dev Days event in the state. This free, in-person gathering aims to illustrate the impact of AI-driven coding on contemporary software development. Scheduled for May 7th, the event will run from 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM.

data.title: Mill Creek Announces Start of Preleasing at Modera Chandler
data.description: A popular garden-style community in Southeast Phoenix in Chandler, Arizona is expanding by 345 new homes. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer, owner-operator, and investment manager known for high-quality rental housing nationwide, revealed the commencement of this project on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Communiqué from Boliden's Annual General Meeting
data.description: In Stockholm on April 28, 2026, the Annual General Meeting of Boliden took place live in Askersund/Zinkgruvan and via postal voting. The Board of Directors was a key focus, with decisions made for the re-election of Karl-Henrik Sundström, Helene Biström, Tomas Eliasson, Perttu.... This event was significant, particularly for shareholders and those interested in the company's leadership, with attendance numbers and voting outcomes shaping the future direction of the organization.

data.title: Microchip Expands its Family of Post-Quantum‑Ready Root of Trust Controllers for Next‑Generation Systems
data.description: Microchip is currently addressing the real-world challenge of transitioning to post-quantum cryptography. This shift is no longer a topic for the future, as the company is actively working on it now. This transition involves implementing new encryption techniques to secure data in the face of quantum computing advancements. Microchip's efforts reflect the growing urgency to update cryptographic systems as quantum computing poses a threat to current encryption methods. The company's work exemplifies the proactive approach needed to address this issue promptly, acknowledging the need for advanced security measures to safeguard sensitive information.

data.title: OpenAI did not meet its targets due to rising compute costs, particularly with ChatGPT growth and an upcoming IPO.
data.description: Challenges within the company's expansion of ChatGPT, coupled with a forthcoming IPO, has brought scrutiny to Sam Altman's aggressive spending approach on computing resources.
